prompt: Create a dramatic square anime fantasy action illustration of a magical girl heroine rendered as a living polished gold statue, lunging forward in a ruined gothic cathedral. The main subject is one full-body character: a young anime girl with huge expressive golden eyes, open shouting mouth, long wind-swept twin-tail hair tied with an oversized bow, star-shaped hair ornaments, frilled magical-girl dress, cape-like ribbons, gloves, thigh-high boots, and ornate armor-like details, all made from highly reflective molten gold metal with engraved linework and mirror highlights. She thrusts one ornate wand or short scepter directly toward the viewer in extreme foreshortening, creating a dynamic low-angle close-up; bright golden energy rings, sparks, and diagonal light streaks explode from the wand and wrap around her body. Include exactly one inset portrait in the upper right: a white-bordered, irregular sticker-like cutout showing the same girl in normal colors, with dark brown hair, red eyes, a red-and-white outfit, and a winking determined expression, placed over a small red background. The background is a dark, blurred medieval cathedral interior with tall arched stained-glass windows, stone floor tiles, rubble, and cool blue-purple shadows, contrasting with the warm gold character. Use highly detailed Japanese anime key visual style, sharp line art, glossy metallic texture, cinematic lighting, intense motion, sparkling particles, shallow depth of field, high contrast, and ultra-detailed rendering. Composition should be crowded and energetic with the gold wand and hand dominating the lower center foreground, hair sweeping across the top, one leg extended to the right, and no readable text or watermark.
